steps.title: Find the starting value
steps.content: On May $1$, the number of days after May $1$ is $x=0$, and the advertisement has $240$ views. So the starting value is $240$.

steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content:
Increasing by $40\%$ every $3$ days means multiplying by
$$
1+\frac{40}{100}=1.40
$$
for each $3$-day period.

steps.title: Count the periods
steps.content: After $x$ days, the number of $3$-day periods is $\frac{x}{3}$, so the model is $$ f(x)=240(1.40)^{\frac{x}{3}} $$ The answer is C.
